item.title: Centong Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Centong Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Centong Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Centong Audio Player is an audio player for Linux that is designed with a simple appearance and is very easy to use

[read more]

Centong Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Centong Audio Player is an audio player for Linux that is designed with a simple appearance and is very easy to use

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Centong Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Centong Audio Player is an audio player for Linux that is designed with a simple appearance and is very easy to use

item.title: STRP x ZRAM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRP x ZRAM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRP x ZRAM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF5733][size=5]STRP x ZRAM[/size][/color]
[color=#FF5733]STRP x ZRAM is a module that provides additional ZRAM (compressed RAM) partition options ranging from 1 GB up to 15 GB on your Android device.[/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Requirements[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]- Magisk 23.0+
- Latest Busybox or Brutal
- Android 7.0+[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## About ZRAM and Swap[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### ZRAM[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]ZRAM compresses unused apps within system RAM, allowing the system to swap less needed processes to the ZRAM partition for faster access at a later time, instead of terminating them. The value you set determines the percentage of RAM allocated to the ZRAM partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### Swap[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Swap uses a portion of the SD card as virtual RAM. The phone attempts to keep as much data in RAM as possible until it's full, then starts using the swap partition on the SD card. It moves inactive memory blocks to the SD card to free up RAM for active processes.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## How to Determine ZRAM or Swap Availability[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]There are two methods:[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]### First Method[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Open a terminal emulator (e.g., Termux) and type:[/size][/color]

```
su -c cat /proc/swaps
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This command checks if your device has any Swap Partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]### Second Method[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]If your phone/ROM features "RAM PLUS," you can change ZRAM between 1 and 15 GB.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How much storage will it consume?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]The storage consumption depends on the option you choose during installation.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### Is it safe to use?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Yes, it's safe.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How to remove or revert to the stock configuration?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Simply remove the module using Magisk.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### I'm experiencing lag after rebooting.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This is normal; give your phone some time to adapt to the new Swap Partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### I'm facing random lags.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Try using a lower ZRAM size during installation.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How can I verify if it's working?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]You can use any partition-checking application, like DiskSpace, or run the following command:[/size][/color]

```
su -c cat /proc/meminfo
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Look for 'SwapTotal' and 'SwapFree' to see if the allocated swap space has changed.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Opening the ZRAM Configuration Menu[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]To open the ZRAM Configuration Menu:[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]1. Make sure you have a rooted Android device with SuperSU or a similar root management tool installed.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]2. Open a terminal emulator or ADB shell on your device.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]3. Run the following command:[/size][/color]

```
su -c strp-zram
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]4. Grant superuser (root) access when prompted.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]5. The ZRAM Configuration Menu will appear, allowing you to configure your ZRAM size or disable ZRAM.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]6. Follow the on-screen instructions to make your selection and configure ZRAM.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]7. After making your choice, the script will inform you of the successful configuration and may prompt you to reboot your device for changes to take effect.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]8. You can exit the menu by selecting "Exit."[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This menu is intended for advanced users with root access to their Android device and a basic understanding of system configurations.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## License[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. For details, please see the License at ...
https://github.com/CRANKV2/ZRAM/blob/main/LICENSE[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Join the Community[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]For discussions and support, join the STRP x UNIVERSE at
https://t.me/AndroidRootModulesCommunity[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=5]STAY FAST ⚡️[/size][/color]
[read more]
item.description:
STRP x ZRAM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF5733][size=5]STRP x ZRAM[/size][/color]
[color=#FF5733]STRP x ZRAM is a module that provides additional ZRAM (compressed RAM) partition options ranging from 1 GB up to 15 GB on your Android device.[/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Requirements[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]- Magisk 23.0+
- Latest Busybox or Brutal
- Android 7.0+[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## About ZRAM and Swap[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### ZRAM[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]ZRAM compresses unused apps within system RAM, allowing the system to swap less needed processes to the ZRAM partition for faster access at a later time, instead of terminating them. The value you set determines the percentage of RAM allocated to the ZRAM partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### Swap[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Swap uses a portion of the SD card as virtual RAM. The phone attempts to keep as much data in RAM as possible until it's full, then starts using the swap partition on the SD card. It moves inactive memory blocks to the SD card to free up RAM for active processes.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## How to Determine ZRAM or Swap Availability[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]There are two methods:[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]### First Method[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Open a terminal emulator (e.g., Termux) and type:[/size][/color]

```
su -c cat /proc/swaps
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This command checks if your device has any Swap Partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]### Second Method[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]If your phone/ROM features "RAM PLUS," you can change ZRAM between 1 and 15 GB.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How much storage will it consume?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]The storage consumption depends on the option you choose during installation.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### Is it safe to use?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Yes, it's safe.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How to remove or revert to the stock configuration?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Simply remove the module using Magisk.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### I'm experiencing lag after rebooting.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This is normal; give your phone some time to adapt to the new Swap Partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### I'm facing random lags.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Try using a lower ZRAM size during installation.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How can I verify if it's working?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]You can use any partition-checking application, like DiskSpace, or run the following command:[/size][/color]

```
su -c cat /proc/meminfo
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Look for 'SwapTotal' and 'SwapFree' to see if the allocated swap space has changed.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Opening the ZRAM Configuration Menu[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]To open the ZRAM Configuration Menu:[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]1. Make sure you have a rooted Android device with SuperSU or a similar root management tool installed.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]2. Open a terminal emulator or ADB shell on your device.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]3. Run the following command:[/size][/color]

```
su -c strp-zram
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]4. Grant superuser (root) access when prompted.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]5. The ZRAM Configuration Menu will appear, allowing you to configure your ZRAM size or disable ZRAM.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]6. Follow the on-screen instructions to make your selection and configure ZRAM.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]7. After making your choice, the script will inform you of the successful configuration and may prompt you to reboot your device for changes to take effect.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]8. You can exit the menu by selecting "Exit."[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This menu is intended for advanced users with root access to their Android device and a basic understanding of system configurations.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## License[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. For details, please see the License at ...
https://github.com/CRANKV2/ZRAM/blob/main/LICENSE[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Join the Community[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]For discussions and support, join the STRP x UNIVERSE at
https://t.me/AndroidRootModulesCommunity[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=5]STAY FAST ⚡️[/size][/color]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
STRP x ZRAM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF5733][size=5]STRP x ZRAM[/size][/color]
[color=#FF5733]STRP x ZRAM is a module that provides additional ZRAM (compressed RAM) partition options ranging from 1 GB up to 15 GB on your Android device.[/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Requirements[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]- Magisk 23.0+
- Latest Busybox or Brutal
- Android 7.0+[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## About ZRAM and Swap[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### ZRAM[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]ZRAM compresses unused apps within system RAM, allowing the system to swap less needed processes to the ZRAM partition for faster access at a later time, instead of terminating them. The value you set determines the percentage of RAM allocated to the ZRAM partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### Swap[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Swap uses a portion of the SD card as virtual RAM. The phone attempts to keep as much data in RAM as possible until it's full, then starts using the swap partition on the SD card. It moves inactive memory blocks to the SD card to free up RAM for active processes.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## How to Determine ZRAM or Swap Availability[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]There are two methods:[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]### First Method[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Open a terminal emulator (e.g., Termux) and type:[/size][/color]

```
su -c cat /proc/swaps
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This command checks if your device has any Swap Partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]### Second Method[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]If your phone/ROM features "RAM PLUS," you can change ZRAM between 1 and 15 GB.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How much storage will it consume?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]The storage consumption depends on the option you choose during installation.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### Is it safe to use?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Yes, it's safe.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How to remove or revert to the stock configuration?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Simply remove the module using Magisk.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### I'm experiencing lag after rebooting.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This is normal; give your phone some time to adapt to the new Swap Partition.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### I'm facing random lags.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Try using a lower ZRAM size during installation.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]### How can I verify if it's working?[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]You can use any partition-checking application, like DiskSpace, or run the following command:[/size][/color]

```
su -c cat /proc/meminfo
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]Look for 'SwapTotal' and 'SwapFree' to see if the allocated swap space has changed.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Opening the ZRAM Configuration Menu[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]To open the ZRAM Configuration Menu:[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]1. Make sure you have a rooted Android device with SuperSU or a similar root management tool installed.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]2. Open a terminal emulator or ADB shell on your device.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]3. Run the following command:[/size][/color]

```
su -c strp-zram
```

[color=#FF5733][size=3]4. Grant superuser (root) access when prompted.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]5. The ZRAM Configuration Menu will appear, allowing you to configure your ZRAM size or disable ZRAM.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]6. Follow the on-screen instructions to make your selection and configure ZRAM.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]7. After making your choice, the script will inform you of the successful configuration and may prompt you to reboot your device for changes to take effect.[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]8. You can exit the menu by selecting "Exit."[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This menu is intended for advanced users with root access to their Android device and a basic understanding of system configurations.[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## License[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. For details, please see the License at ...
https://github.com/CRANKV2/ZRAM/blob/main/LICENSE[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]## Join the Community[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=3]For discussions and support, join the STRP x UNIVERSE at
https://t.me/AndroidRootModulesCommunity[/size][/color]

[color=#FF5733][size=5]STAY FAST ⚡️[/size][/color]
[read more]

item.title: Retail Barcodes Designing Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Retail Barcodes Designing Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: businessbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
Retail Barcodes Designing Software
(Office Apps)
Retail Barcodes Software empowers to design professional retail business and inventory control barcodes tags with latest linear and 2D font standard. Barcode Creator Application instantly produces multiple copies of barcode sticker in various shapes like line, text, pencil, rectangle ellipse, arc and star object.

[read more]
item.description:
Retail Barcodes Designing Software
(Office Apps)
Retail Barcodes Software empowers to design professional retail business and inventory control barcodes tags with latest linear and 2D font standard. Barcode Creator Application instantly produces multiple copies of barcode sticker in various shapes like line, text, pencil, rectangle ellipse, arc and star object.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Retail Barcodes Designing Software
(Office Apps)
Retail Barcodes Software empowers to design professional retail business and inventory control barcodes tags with latest linear and 2D font standard. Barcode Creator Application instantly produces multiple copies of barcode sticker in various shapes like line, text, pencil, rectangle ellipse, arc and star object.

[read more]

item.title: Pen Drive Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.digitalcamerarecovery.org enables to download Pen Drive Recovery Software at affordable cost is able to regain logically crashed or formatted video clips and other files from pen drive in less effort without requiring any expert knowledge. Pen drive data restoration application provides ability to restore office files deleted from storage media due to several types of data loss condition like human fault, virus attack, accidentally corrupted device etc.
[read more]
item.description:
Pen Drive Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.digitalcamerarecovery.org enables to download Pen Drive Recovery Software at affordable cost is able to regain logically crashed or formatted video clips and other files from pen drive in less effort without requiring any expert knowledge. Pen drive data restoration application provides ability to restore office files deleted from storage media due to several types of data loss condition like human fault, virus attack, accidentally corrupted device etc.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Pen Drive Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.digitalcamerarecovery.org enables to download Pen Drive Recovery Software at affordable cost is able to regain logically crashed or formatted video clips and other files from pen drive in less effort without requiring any expert knowledge. Pen drive data restoration application provides ability to restore office files deleted from storage media due to several types of data loss condition like human fault, virus attack, accidentally corrupted device etc.
[read more]

item.title: Free Barcode Label Maker Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Free Barcode Label Maker Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Free Barcode Label Maker Tool
(Office Apps)
Free Barcode Label Software is used to design customized barcodes tags of any size, shape, color, style, barcode value in few easy mouse clicks. Comprehensive Barcode Creator Program saves generated barcode image in variety of graphic format on PC for further references. Innovative Barcode Maker Application provides facility to create the bulk copies of barcodes label in same time for different users.
[read more]
item.description:
Free Barcode Label Maker Tool
(Office Apps)
Free Barcode Label Software is used to design customized barcodes tags of any size, shape, color, style, barcode value in few easy mouse clicks. Comprehensive Barcode Creator Program saves generated barcode image in variety of graphic format on PC for further references. Innovative Barcode Maker Application provides facility to create the bulk copies of barcodes label in same time for different users.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Free Barcode Label Maker Tool
(Office Apps)
Free Barcode Label Software is used to design customized barcodes tags of any size, shape, color, style, barcode value in few easy mouse clicks. Comprehensive Barcode Creator Program saves generated barcode image in variety of graphic format on PC for further references. Innovative Barcode Maker Application provides facility to create the bulk copies of barcodes label in same time for different users.
[read more]

item.title: Retail Barcodes Designing Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Retail Barcodes Designing Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: businessbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
Retail Barcodes Designing Software
(Office Apps)
Retail Barcodes Software allows for creating most versatile barcode labels using advanced dataset generating series techniques (sequential, random and constant value). Barcode Generator Application is used to make 2D barcodes sticker for retail business with use of in-built color and background setting. Barcode Maker Tool provides copy-paste option to generate barcode into any Windows application like MS-Excel, MS-Paint and MS-Word.

[read more]
item.description:
Retail Barcodes Designing Software
(Office Apps)
Retail Barcodes Software allows for creating most versatile barcode labels using advanced dataset generating series techniques (sequential, random and constant value). Barcode Generator Application is used to make 2D barcodes sticker for retail business with use of in-built color and background setting. Barcode Maker Tool provides copy-paste option to generate barcode into any Windows application like MS-Excel, MS-Paint and MS-Word.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Retail Barcodes Designing Software
(Office Apps)
Retail Barcodes Software allows for creating most versatile barcode labels using advanced dataset generating series techniques (sequential, random and constant value). Barcode Generator Application is used to make 2D barcodes sticker for retail business with use of in-built color and background setting. Barcode Maker Tool provides copy-paste option to generate barcode into any Windows application like MS-Excel, MS-Paint and MS-Word.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.description:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

item.title: REALME PHOTOS APK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: REALME PHOTOS APK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
REALME PHOTOS APK
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The realme ColorOS PHOTOS app, ported for AOSP ROMs, brings the feature-rich and user-friendly photo management experience of realme devices to a wider range of Android devices. ColorOS PHOTOS is a powerful gallery app that offers a variety of intuitive tools and functions to enhance your photo viewing and organizing experience.
With this ported version, AOSP ROM users can enjoy the convenience and efficiency of realme's photo app on their devices. The app provides a clean and organized interface, allowing users to easily browse through their photo collections with fluid transitions and smooth scrolling.

ColorOS PHOTOS offers various features to help users manage and organize their photos effectively. It includes a comprehensive set of editing tools, allowing users to enhance their images with filters, effects, and adjustments to achieve the desired look. The app also supports basic photo editing functions such as cropping, rotating, and straightening.

Furthermore, the app provides intelligent categorization and sorting options, making it easier to locate specific photos. It offers features like face recognition and automatic tagging, which automatically groups photos based on people, locations, and events. This enables users to quickly find and relive their favorite memories without the hassle of manual sorting.

In addition to managing local photos, the ported app may also integrate with cloud services, allowing users to access and synchronize their photos across multiple devices seamlessly. This ensures that your photos are securely backed up and readily available whenever and wherever you need them.

Overall, the realme ColorOS PHOTOS app, ported for AOSP ROMs, brings a feature-rich and user-friendly photo management experience to devices running AOSP-based custom ROMs. With its intuitive interface, powerful editing tools, and intelligent organization features, it offers AOSP users a convenient and enjoyable way to view, edit, and organize their photo collections.
[read more]

In addition to managing local photos, the ported app may also integrate with cloud services, allowing users to access and synchronize their photos across multiple devices seamlessly. This ensures that your photos are securely backed up and readily available whenever and wherever you need them.

Overall, the realme ColorOS PHOTOS app, ported for AOSP ROMs, brings a feature-rich and user-friendly photo management experience to devices running AOSP-based custom ROMs. With its intuitive interface, powerful editing tools, and intelligent organization features, it offers AOSP users a convenient and enjoyable way to view, edit, and organize their photo collections.
[read more]

The realme ColorOS PHOTOS app, ported for AOSP ROMs, brings the feature-rich and user-friendly photo management experience of realme devices to a wider range of Android devices. ColorOS PHOTOS is a powerful gallery app that offers a variety of intuitive tools and functions to enhance your photo viewing and organizing experience.
With this ported version, AOSP ROM users can enjoy the convenience and efficiency of realme's photo app on their devices. The app provides a clean and organized interface, allowing users to easily browse through their photo collections with fluid transitions and smooth scrolling.

ColorOS PHOTOS offers various features to help users manage and organize their photos effectively. In addition to managing local photos, the ported app may also integrate with cloud services, allowing users to access and synchronize their photos across multiple devices seamlessly. This ensures that your photos are securely backed up and readily available whenever and wherever you need them.

Overall, the realme ColorOS PHOTOS app, ported for AOSP ROMs, brings a feature-rich and user-friendly photo management experience to devices running AOSP-based custom ROMs. With its intuitive interface, powerful editing tools, and intelligent organization features, it offers AOSP users a convenient and enjoyable way to view, edit, and organize their photo collections.

item.title: CubexSoft PDF Unlocker [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: CubexSoft PDF Unlocker [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sam0653
item.itunes:summary:
CubexSoft PDF Unlocker
(Utilities)
CubexSoft PDF Unlocker is a remarkable solution to help users batch unlock multiple PDF documents in single go. The tool is designed to remove both user password and master password from PDF files and enable permission rights of copying, editing, printing etc. (You must enter user password into software panel when it prompts you; for accessing PDF file for unlocking password protection.) and creates a new PDF file, with all restrictions removed. The PDF Unlock carries a simple GUI which makes it possible for all users to effortlessly remove password protection from PDF files without any difficulty.
With option to choose destination folder location for saving resultant files, PDF Unlocker Tool makes it easy for users to quickly navigate and open them with no hassles. It also maintains to keep the data integrity and folder structure intact throughout the process. To check the complete working procedure of the tool, you can download its free demo edition that will permit you to unlock 1 PDF, as free trial.

Key Benefits of using PDF Unlocker

1. Dual options to select PDF files/folders for unlocking
2. Provides option to Batch unlock multiple PDF files at once
3. Efficient solution to remove PDF editing, printing, copying and other restrictions with ease
4. Remove Files option is there to delete unnecessary PDF files from software panel
5. Keeps all PDF formatting, hyperlinks, font-styles etc. in exact form
6. DIY interface allows PDF unlocking in few simple steps
7. Suitable for all PDF and Windows OS editions
8. Free demo edition allows unlocking of 1 PDF, for evaluation purpose

Read more >> https://www.cubexsoft.com/pdf-unlocker/


[read more]

[read more]
